name: Delta SkyMiles Gold American Express Card
perks: First checked bag free for you and up to 8 companions on same reservation (saves up to $360 per round trip)
2x miles on Delta purchases, restaurants, and U.S. supermarkets
$100 Delta flight credit after spending $10,000 in a calendar year
20% back as statement credit on in-flight Delta purchases
Companion certificate toward a domestic flight annually (after $10,000 spend)
drawbacks: Miles tied to Delta SkyMiles ecosystem
Companion certificate requires $10,000 annual spend plus taxes and fees
